text:
n spite
of a malefic's presence in the 7th or 8th. One would be plunged
in poverty and sorrow, if there be malefics in the 1st, 7th, 8th
and 9th houses. When the lord of the 5th is posited in the 6th
house and the ford of the latter in the ascendant, the subject will
meet with death through weapons. When planets occupying
Signs or ArhSas of Saturn and Mars are conjoined with Venus
and the Moon and are aspected by malefics, the woman would
take to immoral ways along with her mother (See P. 196 (x).
If there are two malefics in the 7th house, she will be lustful and
be widowed; If three, unchaste and will kill her husband; and
if three benefics are there, she will become the spouse of a king
endowed with virtues. One would be tormented by excessive
lust, if Venus and Saturn occupy each other's Navamsa or
aspect each other and if the Lagna be Aquarius with Taurus
Amsa or Taurus with Aquarius Amsa.
A malefic in the 7th house from the Moon is likely to cause
